content.text:
Everything is in order. Here's a summary of every change made:

---

## What was built

### `packages/shared/src/theme.ts` *(new)*
Defines the shared theme contract:
- **`AppThemeId`** — `"t3-light" | "t3-dark" | "t3-midnight"`
- **`ThemePreference`** — `AppThemeId | "system"`
- **`AppThemeColors`** — 14 semantic colour slots: `background`, `foreground`, `accent`, `sidebar`, `sidebarForeground`, `editor`, `terminal`, `statusBar`, `statusBarForeground`, `card`, `border`, `muted`, `mutedForeground`, `primary`
- **`AppTheme`** — full theme descriptor with id, name, isDark flag, and colors
- **`BUILT_IN_THEMES`** — the three concrete themes with their colour values
- **`getThemeById()`** — safe lookup helper

### `packages/shared/package.json`
Added `"./theme"` subpath export pointing at `src/theme.ts`.

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(rewritten)*
- Accepts `ThemePreference` (`AppThemeId | "system"`) instead of the old `"light" | "dark" | "system"`
- Migrates legacy stored values (`"light"` → `"t3-light"`, `"dark"` → `"t3-dark"`) on read
- Sets both `data-theme="<id>"` attribute and `.dark` CSS class on `<html>` — CSS variable blocks key off the former, Tailwind dark utilities off the latter
- Returns `{ themePreference, resolvedThemeId, resolvedTheme, setTheme }` — `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` is preserved so every existing consumer (ChatView, DiffPanel, ChatMarkdown, etc.) continues to work unchanged

### `apps/web/src/index.css`
- Added 6 new slots to `@theme inline`: `--color-sidebar`, `--color-sidebar-foreground`, `--color-editor`, `--color-terminal`, `--color-status-bar`, `--color-status-bar-foreground`
- Added fallback defaults for new slots in `:root`
- Appended three `:root[data-theme="..."]` blocks (specificity 0,1,1 — beats the `@variant dark` block with equal specificity by source order) that set every semantic variable for each theme

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Visual swatch picker with:
- A `3-column grid` of `ThemeSwatch` cards — each renders a miniature app-layout preview (sidebar strip, content area with fake toolbar and lines, status bar) using the theme's own colours as inline styles, plus a 5-slot colour strip below
- A `SystemOption` button for "follow OS"
- Shows the currently active palette name below the grid

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`
Replaced the old radio-button Appearance section with `<ThemeSelector />`. Removed the now-unused `THEME_OPTIONS` array and old destructured `{ theme, setTheme, resolvedTheme }` call.
